About our company
The Eszter Ltd. has been operating as the legal successor of Eszter Lp. since 1 October 2020.
We started our operation in 1993 in Mosonmagyaróvár as a turning and machining factory. At the turn of the millenium, our company opened up to automatization in order to serve the needs of the region’s industry with the production of customized machines.
From the simple assembly stations at the beginning, we have now progressed to the implementation of complex production lines that operate fully automatically.
Due to our decades of experience in machine production, we can guarantee that we deliver systems that meet our customers’ needs, so they can increase productivity, reduce costs and improve safety.

Mik azok a sütik?
A cookie, más néven süti, egy rövid szöveg, amelyet a felkeresett webhely küld el böngészőjébe. Segítségével webhelyünk megjegyzi a látogatásával kapcsolatos információkat, például az Ön által használt nyelvet és egyéb beállításokat. Ezáltal gördülékenyebbé válhat a következő látogatás, és könnyebb lesz a webhely használata.

products.text:
Services - Eszternet
Skip links
Skip to primary navigation
Skip to content
SERVICES
Automatization
We undertake the design and construction of manual assembly stations, semi-automatic and automatic production lines. Design and implementation are carried out according to the specific needs of our customers, whether they are assembling, inspecting or packaging equipment for electronics, automotive or healthcare products.
Automatization
We undertake the design and construction of manual assembly stations, semi-automatic and automatic production lines. Design and implementation are carried out according to the specific needs of our customers, whether they are assembling, inspecting or packaging equipment for electronics, automotive or healthcare products.
Robotisation
Our main profile is the design and construction of production cells and assembly lines based on industrial robots.
While the quality and productivity of a traditional semi-automatic workstation can be variable, a robotic production cell can perform the most monotonous production tasks 24 hours a day, guaranteeing constant quality.
Let us program and integrate the different robots, and we will design the complete robot support environment.
Robotisation
Our main profile is the design and construction of production cells and assembly lines based on industrial robots.
While the quality and productivity of a traditional semi-automatic workstation can be variable, a robotic production cell can perform the most monotonous production tasks 24 hours a day, guaranteeing constant quality.
Let us program and integrate the different robots, and we will design the complete robot support environment
CNC Mechanical cutting
With our three- and four-axis CNC machining centres and lathes, we are able to produce customized and product series. Our Mazak and Haas machining centres allow the machining of steel, aluminium, plastic or pump products.
CNC Mechanical cutting
With our three- and four-axis CNC machining centres and lathes, we are able to produce customized and product series. Our Mazak and Haas machining centres allow the machining of steel, aluminium, plastic or pump products.
What we’re proud of
